creator: sixday@sixday.hu
text:
(In reply to Torsten Zuehlsdorff from comment #4)
Hi Tortsten,

My system is an FreeBSD 10.3-RELEASE-p11 amd64 and if you mean the /etc/pkg/FreeBSD.conf file content as the package repository then yes I can change that.
Currently I'm using url: "pkg+http://pkg.FreeBSD.org/${ABI}/latest",

Don't misunderstood me, I highly trust in your work, but are you sure it's a good idea to play with a prod system which an entire company relies on? It makes my legs shaking :) (I believe the update is not reversible).
Maybe it's better if I fire up a test installation in a jail quickly...
